output.changeContext: Variations added to DynamicContentCarousel (editor-only: index.tsx + 4 new SVG icons). No PHP changes.

rawContent.note: Test page content changed since last snapshot (new variations added). Code files not modified. Full QA run required.

html.note: HTML output changed with test page updates. Full QA run executed.

build.detail: Build compiles without errors. 10 pre-existing lint warnings in other blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, EventHero, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) — all react-hooks/exhaustive-deps — none in DynamicContentCarousel.

lint.note: No lint errors or warnings in DynamicContentCarousel block files.

registration.detail: block.json schema valid. apiVersion 3 present. name matches takt/dynamic-content-carousel pattern. All file references exist. Attribute types and defaults valid.

variationsStructure.detail: All 4 variations correctly structured in index.tsx.

variations.name: post
variations.title: Blog Carousel
variations.checks: PASS - isDefault correctly set to true on the first variation only

patternNotes: isActive uses array form ['postsType'] — correct, matches Archive block pattern
scope includes both 'inserter' and 'transform' — correct for block inserter + transform panel display
isDefault: true only on 'post' variation — correct, only one default allowed
All variations set attributes.postsType matching the block.json enum — correct

icons.convention: PASS - 24x24 viewBox, no explicit fill/stroke (inherits currentColor), no strokes, pixel-aligned rectangles
PASS - 24x24 viewBox, no explicit fill/stroke (inherits currentColor), no strokes
PASS - 24x24 viewBox, no explicit fill/stroke (inherits currentColor), no strokes, uses path+rect for document icon
PASS - 24x24 viewBox, no explicit fill/stroke (inherits currentColor), no strokes, distinct from Resource icon (different internal rect layout)

svgIcons.baseIconComparison: DynamicContentCarousel.svg (base block icon) follows same convention: viewBox='0 0 24 24', no fill/stroke/width/height attrs. All 4 variation icons match this convention.

tsxPhpSync.detail: taktician_validate_all sync check passed. All sub-checks passed: phpExtractPattern, phpDocblock, htmlStructureSync, attributeUsage, contextConsistency, classNameInsideBlockProps, redundantNullCoalescing, phpFunctionExistence. No issues found.
tsxPhpSync.note: Change is editor-only (index.tsx + SVGs). PHP template unchanged. Sync trivially maintained.

testPageRegression.swiperInitialized: All 16 instances with posts rendered Swiper correctly (1 instance is manual/empty — correct, renders heading only with no carousel)

postTypeRendering.blog_posts: Sections 0-6 + 11 + 13-16: Blog posts rendered with images, categories, dates, links — PASS
postTypeRendering.team_members: Section 7 (Meet the Team): 3 team member cards with images, names, roles — PASS
postTypeRendering.resources: Sections 5 + 8 (More Resources / Browse Resources): 3 resource cards each, no images (resources have no featured image), correct links — PASS
postTypeRendering.policies: Sections 9 + 12 (Our Policies / Hidden When Empty): 3 policy cards each with View Resource links — PASS

controlsBehavior.navigationPresent: Navigation (prev/next buttons) present on all sections with showNavigation=true — PASS
controlsBehavior.navigationAbsent: Section 14 (Minimal, showNavigation=false + showPagination=false): no nav buttons — PASS
controlsBehavior.paginationPresent: Pagination bar present on all sections with showPagination=true — PASS
controlsBehavior.loopMode: Sections 15-16: data-loop='1' set correctly, swiper-slide-index attributes present for cloned slides — PASS
controlsBehavior.autoplay: Section 16: data-autoplay='1', data-autoplay-delay='5', data-label-pause + data-label-play present for carousel-autoplay-toggle button — PASS
controlsBehavior.autoplayToggleBtn: Section 16 has carousel-autoplay-toggle button confirmed via data-label-pause/data-label-play attributes in innerDataAttributes — PASS

emptyState.manualEmptySelectedPosts: Section 10 (Featured Posts, manual + empty selectedPosts): childCount=0, no carousel rendered, heading still shown — PASS
emptyState.ariaFallback: Section 11 (no heading set): aria-label='Content Carousel' used instead of aria-labelledby — PASS

testPageRegression.ariaStructure: All sections with headings use aria-labelledby referencing heading ID. Empty-heading section uses aria-label fallback. aria-live present on all active carousel instances.

accessibility.reason: Change is editor-only (block variations). No frontend PHP/HTML changes. Accessibility was verified in prior QA cycle. skipPhases.accessibility=true from content comparison.

manualChecks.evidence: All 16 carousels with headings use aria-labelledby referencing correct heading IDs
2 aria-live elements per carousel instance (for slide change announcements)
PHP template sets role='group' aria-roledescription='slide' aria-label='Slide X of Y' on each swiper-slide
PHP template sets role='region' aria-roledescription='carousel' on swiper-parent
Section 16 confirms data-label-pause and data-label-play present for dynamic aria-label switching

interactiveBehavior.note: Editor-only change. No frontend JS modified. skipPhases.interactiveBehavior=true from content comparison. Carousel JS behavior unchanged from prior QA cycle.

markupDuplication.detail: No duplicated markup patterns found. Editor-only change (index.tsx variations array + SVG icons). No responsive duplication introduced.

specCompliance.detail: Block instances on test page: 17 total. All wrapped in takt/demo-container. Swiper initializes correctly. All 4 post types (post, team_member, resource, policy) render with their correct card templates. No stale markup. No unresolved placeholders.

visualObservations.375px: Mobile layout: single-column carousel. Cards stack to full width. Navigation arrows visible above carousel, pagination bar renders as full-width progress strip. All post types (blog, team, resource, policy) render correctly at narrow width. Long heading wraps cleanly without overflow.
visualObservations.768px: Tablet layout: multi-column cards visible (2-3 per slide). ThemeHeading transitions to two-column layout for sections with descriptions. Navigation controls align correctly. Resource and policy cards with no images render cleanly.
visualObservations.1024px: Laptop layout: 3-column card grid in carousel. Dark background pattern visible behind all blocks. Spacing and container gutters correct. Long-content edge case (section 13) wraps heading across 2 lines without overflow.
visualObservations.1440px: Desktop layout: full 3-column carousel with comfortable gutters. All 17 block variations visible and correctly spaced. Autoplay carousel (last section) shows play/pause button in navigation bar. Empty/manual carousel (section 10, Featured Posts) shows only the heading with no carousel below — correct empty state behavior.

passedChecks: No lint errors in DynamicContentCarousel files
4 variations correctly structured: post, team_member, resource, policy
isActive uses array form matching Archive block pattern
scope includes inserter + transform on all variations
isDefault: true on post variation only
4 SVG icons follow conventions: 24x24 viewBox, no explicit fill/stroke/width/height, currentColor inheritance
TSX/PHP sync passes all automated checks
Test page has 17 block instances — all in DemoContainers
Swiper initializes on all 16 populated instances
All post types render with correct card templates (post, team-member, resource, policy)
Navigation/pagination controls toggle correctly (section 14 correctly hides both)
Loop mode correctly sets data-loop=1 and swiper clones slides
Autoplay carousel correctly sets data-autoplay=1 with play/pause toggle button
Empty manual selection renders heading only with no carousel (correct)
ARIA: aria-labelledby on all heading-carrying sections; aria-label fallback on headingless section
12 screenshots captured at 375/768/1024/1440px across Chromium, Firefox, WebKit
